display.purpose: Large command phrases, empty-state calls, and wordmark-scale moments.

label.purpose: Panel chrome, status metadata, source labels, and compact command text.

shadows.name: none-at-rest
shadows.purpose: Default for current dot-matrix panels and build rows.

shadows.name: accent-micro-glow
shadows.purpose: Tiny item and board highlights only.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, and small state color changes.

motion.name: row-open
motion.purpose: Build row reveal and menu extension.

motion.name: glitch-feedback
motion.purpose: Short command feedback on bracket controls and logo hover.

components.name: Bracket Command Button
components.description: Compact command control for menu, theme, reset, and panel actions.
components.css: .ds-bracket-command { min-height: 34px; padding: 7px 8px; border: 0; border-radius: 0; background: transparent; color: var(--aptos-inverted, #f7f7f7); font: 700 10px/1 'DM Mono', 'Courier New', Consolas, monospace; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; } .ds-bracket-command:hover, .ds-bracket-command:focus-visible { color: var(--aptos-accent, #d9f933); outline: 1px solid transparent; }

components.name: Draggable Panel
components.description: Square-edged draggable instrument panel with mono chrome.
components.html:
06 / Components[ Drag ]
SELECT A BUILD
components.css: .ds-panel { display: grid; grid-template-rows: 36px minmax(0, 1fr); min-width: 260px; min-height: 180px; border-top: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--aptos-inverted, #f7f7f7) 18%, transparent); border-bottom: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--aptos-inverted, #f7f7f7) 18%, transparent); border-left: 0; border-right: 0; border-radius: 0; background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--aptos-primary, #111216) 94%, transparent); color: var(--aptos-inverted, #f7f7f7); box-shadow: none; } .ds-panel-bar { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 0 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--aptos-inverted, #f7f7f7) 18%, transparent); color: var(--aptos-muted, #f7f7f78f); font: 700 10px/1 'DM Mono', 'Courier New', Consolas, monospace; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-panel-bar strong { color: var(--aptos-accent, #d9f933); } .ds-panel-body { padding: 10px; font: 700 18px/0.95 Rajdhani, sans-serif; }

components.name: Build Record Row
components.description: Compact clipped row for source, rank, build name, icons, and demand signals.
components.html:
[ S ]
[ Mobalytics ] [ Early / 4 ]Cards & Cartridges
components.css: .ds-build-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 42px minmax(0, 1fr); align-items: center; min-height: 46px; padding: 0 10px; border: 0; background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--aptos-inverted, #f7f7f7) 3%, transparent); color: var(--aptos-inverted, #f7f7f7); clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 9px) 0, 100% 9px, 100% 100%, 9px 100%, 0 calc(100% - 9px)); } .ds-build-row:hover, .ds-build-row:focus-within { border-color: var(--aptos-accent, #d9f933); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--aptos-inverted, #f7f7f7) 5%, transparent); } .ds-build-row small { display: block; color: var(--aptos-muted, #f7f7f78f); font: 700 10px/1 'DM Mono', monospace; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-build-row strong { display: block; color: var(--aptos-inverted, #f7f7f7); font: 700 13px/1 Rajdhani, sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-rank { color: var(--aptos-accent, #d9f933); font: 700 18px/1 Rajdhani, sans-serif; }

components.name: Search Field
components.description: Transparent wire field for search and filter entry.
components.css: .ds-search { display: grid; gap: 6px; color: var(--aptos-muted, #f7f7f78f); font: 700 10px/1 'DM Mono', monospace; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-search input { height: 28px; padding: 0 8px; border: 0; border-top: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--aptos-inverted, #f7f7f7) 18%, transparent); border-bottom: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--aptos-inverted, #f7f7f7) 18%, transparent); border-radius: 0; background: transparent; color: var(--aptos-inverted, #f7f7f7); font: inherit; outline: 0; text-transform: none; } .ds-search input:focus-visible { border-color: var(--aptos-accent, #d9f933); }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Compact uppercase filter token with selected signal color.
components.css: .ds-chip { min-height: 24px; padding: 0; border: 0; border-radius: 0; background: transparent; color: var(--aptos-inverted, #f7f7f7); font: 700 10px/1 'DM Mono', monospace; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; } .ds-chip:hover, .ds-chip:focus-visible, .ds-chip.is-selected { color: var(--aptos-accent, #d9f933); outline: 1px solid transparent; }

components.name: Rank Badge
components.description: Transparent tier mark that uses color as a contained data accent.
components.css: .ds-rank-badge { display: inline-grid; place-items: center; min-width: 42px; height: 32px; padding: 0; border: 0; background: transparent; color: var(--aptos-accent, #d9f933); font: 700 18px/1 Rajdhani, sans-serif; box-shadow: none; }

narrative.overview: opnr.gg is a desktop command surface for TFT players who want more control than any single build source gives them. The visual system should feel like a technical cockpit for comp discovery: dense, sharp, inspectable, and built for active manipulation.
keyCharacteristics: Dense desktop information, organized for repeated scanning.
Flat panel layers with linework and state color instead of decorative shadows.
Bracketed commands and mono labels for a technical cockpit feel.
Neon signal accent used sparingly for status, active states, and intent.
Performance-conscious effects: motion must stay responsive during dragging, resizing, and hover inspection.

rules.name: The Signal Rarity Rule
rules.body: Signal Lime is for live affordance and state, never decoration. If more than roughly 10 percent of a screen glows lime, the interface is shouting.

rules.name: The No Pure Void Rule
rules.body: Use Cockpit Void rather than pure black. Future dark neutrals should stay slightly tinted so the field feels engineered, not empty.

rules.name: The Flat Instrument Rule
rules.body: Panels are instruments, not cards. Use linework, coordinates, and state color for hierarchy before adding shadows.

dos: Do preserve the app/product posture: this is an app people work in, not a landing page.
Do keep the cool, edgy, technical cockpit feel from PRODUCT.md.
Do treat performance as design. Dot backgrounds, panel resizing, hover inspection, and drag interactions must remain responsive.
donts: Don't make opnr.gg feel like a serif editorial publication.
Don't make it feel like a soft SaaS marketing page, airy landing-page hero, or brochure.
Don't turn the app into a generic card dashboard or corporate BI surface.
Don't bury source data inside vague summaries when players need control, comparison, and inspection.
